title: Tehran selling deal with US as victory – but for Iranians it was necessity
summary_full: For many Iranians, the question is not whether the deal means victory, but whether it lowers prices and reduces fear of another war.
summary_public: For many Iranians, the question is not whether the deal means victory, but whether it lowers prices and reduces fear of another war.

IR.label: neutral
